scholarship_name: Bath Global Excellence Scholarship 2026
eligibility: Students joining a full-time taught Master’s course in September 2026 at the University of Bath.

scholarship_name: ICJ Judicial Fellowship Programme 2026

scholarship_name: FIDH ICC Internship 2026

scholarship_name: Teach for India Fellowship 2026
eligibility: Graduate students, Indian citizens or Overseas Citizens of India (OCI) who shall complete graduation by June/July 2026

scholarship_name: ANRF J. C. Bose Grant (JBG) 2026
eligibility: Indian national, 45-65 years of age, active and senior scientist/engineer, record of outstanding performance in the field of science and technology.

scholarship_name: CIJ Climate Investigations Training Scholarship 2026
eligibility: Early-mid career journalist who lives and works in any country in Africa, Latin America, West Asia, or South Asia, with experience or demonstrable interest in environmental or climate reporting.

scholarship_name: BOC Scholarship Odisha 2025-26
eligibility: Permanent resident of Odisha, enrolled in ITI or Polytechnic courses, belong to General, ST, SC, OBC and SEBC categories.

scholarship_name: University of Oregon ICSP Scholarship 2026

class: International students at the University of Oregon

eligibility: International students at the University of Oregon. Must be admissible or fully admitted to the University of Oregon, not be U.S. citizens, U.S. permanent residents, or eligible to receive U.S. federal financial assistance, must demonstrate sufficient financial resources in addition to the scholarship, have a minimum cumulative GPA of 3.5.

scholarship_name: Reuters-Oxford Journalism Fellowship Programme 2026-27
eligibility: Mid-career journalists with a minimum of five years’ journalistic experience, or in exceptional cases be able to demonstrate an equivalent level of journalistic expertise.

scholarship_name: Nehru Trust's UK Travel Awards 2026-27

class: Scholars and professionals in museums, galleries, universities or other specified institutions

scholarship_name: Government of Brunei Darussalam Scholarship 2026-27

scholarship_name: World Bank Group’s Premier Internship Program 2026

scholarship_name: Turkiye Scholarships 2026
eligibility: Students pursuing associate, UG, PG and Ph.D. levels. Must be an international citizen, willing to pursue studies at the universities in Turkey, and below the age of 21 for UG/Associate, 30 for PG level, 35 for Ph.D., and 50 for Research scholarship.

scholarship_name: UCL India Excellence Scholarship 2026-27

eligibility: International students commencing undergraduate studies at Newcastle University are eligible to apply for the scholarship.

scholarship_name: Ashinaga Foundation Spring-Summer Internship 2026
eligibility: Graduate students and young professionals with a strong interest in social impact, education, or international development.

scholarship_name: MBZUAI Undergraduate Research Internship Program (UGRIP) 2025

scholarship_name: PM YASASVI Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme For OBC, EBC, And DNT Students, Haryana

scholarship_name: KWI International Fellowship Program 2026
eligibility: International postdoctoral and senior researchers with a PhD who are conducting research in cultural studies, humanities, or social sciences that align with KWI's research focus are eligible to apply for the fellowship.

scholarship_name: Ute and György Széll International PhD Scholarship 2026-27

scholarship_name: DMI Patna PGDM Scholarship 2026
eligibility: Management applicants holding a Bachelor’s degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks (45% for SC/ST/Differently Abled students) from a recognised/deemed university/institute by UGC/AICTE and a valid score in CAT 2025/XAT 2026/GMAT (2022-26)/CMAT 2026/MAT (September 2025 or later)

scholarship_name: Norwegian BI Presidential Scholarship 2026

eligibility: Doctoral students from Germany or other countries are eligible for this scholarship.

scholarship_name: University of Glasgow India Excellence Award 2026

scholarship_name: Wells Mountain Foundation Scholarship 2026
eligibility: Students pursuing undergraduate degrees, be 35 years old or younger as of 1 August 2026, have completed secondary education or be in the final year, with above-average to excellent grade, be applying to a university or currently enrolled in classes for their first undergraduate degree, plan to live and work in their home country after graduation, have participated in volunteer service prior to applying for the scholarship and demonstrate a commitment to volunteering within their community during their studies, display the need for financial assistance

scholarship_name: DAWN Rising Fellowships 2026
eligibility: Women feminists under the age of 40, from the Global South, demonstrating a commitment to feminist principles and methodologies.

scholarship_name: ACU International Student Accommodation Scholarship 2025-26

eligibility: Postgraduate students, international (overseas) students, pursuing a MRes program at Imperial College London: MRes Neurotechnology, MRes Bioengineering, MRes Cancer Technology

scholarship_name: The British Academy International Fellowship 2026
eligibility: Early career researchers with a PhD from a non-UK university, no more than five years of postdoctoral experience, currently working outside the UK, without UK citizenship, and with a clearly defined research proposal agreed with a UK host researcher are eligible to apply for the fellowship.

scholarship_name: University of Nottingham, UK International Undergraduate Excellence Scholarships 2026
eligibility: Undergraduate students, be an international, self-funded, fee-payer student, have achieved AAA grades or international equivalent, hold an offer to begin a full-time undergraduate (RQF level 4) degree programme for 2026-27 at the University of Nottingham, UK, not be receiving any other funding

scholarship_name: Frédéric Bastiat Fellowship 2026-27
eligibility: Graduate students enrolled in master's, juris doctoral, or doctoral programs from any university, in any discipline, with an interest in public policy.

scholarship_name: NIAS Fellowship 2026

eligibility: OBC students in Class 11 and above, Indian citizen, domiciled in Delhi, studying at the post-matriculation/post-secondary level of studies in a government-recognised institution, annual parent(s)/guardian income of not more than ₹1,00,000

scholarship_name: Vocational Training Fee Reimbursement for SC Students, Maharashtra 2025-26
eligibility: SC category students of Maharashtra, domicile of Maharashtra, belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category, have been admitted through the PPP scheme to a Government Skill Development Institute or a Private Institute, have taken admission through the Centralised Admission Process (CAP), have an annual family income of less than or equal to ₹8,00,000 from all sources

scholarship_name: Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme Government of India, Maharashtra 2025-26
eligibility: To be eligible, an applicant must be a domicile of Maharashtra, belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category of the state, have passed Class 10 from a recognised institution, have an annual family income of not more than ₹2,50,000, and not have a gap of more than 2 years in their formal education.

scholarship_name: State Government Open Merit Scholarship, Maharashtra 2025-26
eligibility: Class 12 passed students of Maharashtra who are pursuing a graduation degree in Arts, Commerce, Science, or Law.

scholarship_name: Tuition Fee and Examination Fee for Tribal Students (Freeship), Maharashtra 2025-26
eligibility: To be eligible for this scholarship, an applicant must be a domicile of Maharashtra, belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category, be studying at the post-matric level at a recognised institution, and have an annual family income of no more than ₹2,50,000 from all sources.
scholarship_amount: Reimbursement for tuition and examination fees according to the approved fee structure of the respective college or institution.

scholarship_name: Scholarship to Meritorious Students Possessing Mathematics/Physics, Maharashtra 2025-26
eligibility: Indian national, domicile of Maharashtra, secured at least 60% marks in the Science stream of Class 12, or more than 60% in Mathematics and Physics, pursuing a graduation degree in Science, Mathematics and Physics as main subjects

scholarship_name: Post-Matric Scholarship to VJNT Students, Maharashtra 2025-26
